name: proteus
description: A Codex plugin for structured, continuous, exploitability-driven vulnerability research in arbitrary codebases.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate professional vulnerability research with memory, strategy, and realistic validation.
interface.longDescription: Proteus coordinates structured vulnerability research for arbitrary codebases through named specialist agents: Argus, Loom, Chaos, Libris, Mimic, Artificer, and Skeptic. It emphasizes ROI-based surface selection, anti-revisit memory, realistic validation gates, PoC/lab discipline, and conservative exploitability decisions.
defaultPrompt: Initialize continuous vulnerability research for this codebase.
Plan the next high-ROI offensive research round.
Validate this candidate with realistic PoC and negative controls.
